title: mentha × villosa var. cordifolia
intro: Mentha × villosa var. cordifolia, also known as Heartleaf Peppermint, is a variety of the peppermint plant with heart-shaped leaves and a more compact growth habit. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and digestive-aiding properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits associated with Mentha × villosa var. cordifolia include relief from nausea, digestion issues, and headaches, as well as its ability to freshen breath and reduce stress. This plant can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
